3086480.name: STALCRAFT:X ZIVCAS Corporation 2024 Season Pack №1
3086480.description:
Intercepted ZIVCAS resources are now available in the ZIVCAS Corporation Season Pack № 1.

This pack includes 50 Season Levels, 50 Tactical Reserves, 15 cases with unique Season Styles, and two Evergreen charms.



Note!
  • This pack can only be purchased ONCE per character;
  • All rewards are personal;
  • All rewards can be found on your Personal Warehouse;
  • These rewards are not cross-platform and can only be used on Steam;
  • These rewards can only be granted to the same Steam account that was used to made the purchase. If you have some issues, contact our EXBO Support;
  • EXBO may update, replace, or remove in-game content at any time.
3086480.supported_languages:
英语, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
